Package sailpoint.object

Class BundleArchive

  • java.lang.Object
    • sailpoint.tools.xml.AbstractXmlObject
      • sailpoint.object.SailPointObject
        • sailpoint.object.Archive
          • sailpoint.object.BundleArchive
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, sailpoint.tools.xml.PersistentXmlObject, sailpoint.tools.xml.XMLReferenceTarget
    public class BundleArchive
extends Archive
    Extension of Archive to represent archived versions of Bundles.
    See Also:
